name: Soul Machines Interactions API
description:
The Soul Machines Interactions API lets you create fully customized digital person interactions on demand — programmatically, at scale. Instead of pre-configuring static avatars, you define each interaction's context, purpose, personality, and tone in real time, then receive a unique, shareable URL to deliver that personalized experience to your end users.

### How it works
1.  **Make an API request** — Send a JSON payload describing who the digital person should be (avatar, name, role, tone) and what they should do (purpose, context, objectives).
2.  **Get a unique URL** — The API responds with a secure interaction link you can embed, share, or open in a browser.
3.  **Run the session** — Your end user talks to the digital person. When they finish, you can capture interaction results programmatically.

### Why you'd use it
*   **Deliver just-in-time personalization** — tailor conversations for each customer, scenario, or moment.
*   **Scale without overhead** — no need to pre-create and maintain hundreds of static configurations.
*   **Stay in control** — define goals, tone, and context dynamically to align the AI's behavior with your brand.

This flexible API-first approach makes it easy to orchestrate rich, personalized digital people experiences while keeping integration and backend logic clean and scalable.

Obtain an API key from [Soul Machines Digital Workforce Connect](https://workforce.soulmachines.com/).
